title: Env Orchestration Environment Variables
description: Orchestration-level environment variables used by docker-compose.yml. Each microservice has its own .env file; these vars are shared infrastructure credentials. Derived from repos/packages/env-orchestration/.env.template.

MINIO_ROOT_USER.description: Root username for all MinIO instances in the Docker Compose stack.

MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD.description: Root password for all MinIO instances. Must be changed in production.
